description: Generates high-quality figures showing the expression of genes in spatial context.
author: Thorin Tabor;UCSD - Mesirov Lab
plan:
## spatialGE.STplot.Launcher GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
spatialGE.STplot.Launcher is a GenePattern module that Generates high-quality figures showing the expression of genes in spatial context.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: dataset, sample.info, gene.info
- Optional: domain.info

### 3. Command Line
```
app.html ? <dataset> <sample.info> <gene.info> <domain.info>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: Spatial transcriptomics data, coming from spatialGE.Preprocessing, spatialGE.STclust or another spatialGE module.

parameters.name: sample.info
parameters.description: JSON file containing spot/cell and gene statistics for each sample, coming from the spatialGE.Preprocessing module.

parameters.name: gene.info
parameters.description: JSON file containing gene names for each sample, coming from the spatialGE.Preprocessing module.

parameters.name: domain.info
parameters.description: Optionally, a JSON file containing domain/cluster statistics for each sample, coming from the spatialGE.STclust module, may be provided if using clustering data in plots.
